race.comment: MARIEMAC (6) was only fair on debut in town when well supported on the back of some strong trials. Strikes an easier assignment at start two and has the benefit of race experience. Should play a significant role this time. TSARDEAL (3) raced once in the maiden preparation when fifth at Hawkesbury back on December 14. Strips fitter for two trials in town and finds a nice race to kick things off. OCEAN EMPRESS (8) was well found by punters first-up at Canberra but just lacked the killer instinct. Better for that and keeps Collett. Not dismissing. ROGUE NATION (1) returns and was in the money at only start. Readied with two trials and rates among the main hopes in an open contest.
